title: openpouch verify result
description: `openpouch verify --json` / MCP `openpouch_verify`. NOTE: `ok` is the VERDICT here — false means the checks failed (exit 8), while the object still follows this shape (it also carries `error` fields only when the command itself errored, e.g. no manifest — that case uses error.schema.json). Contract: `required` guaranteed, additive evolution.

ok.description: true = every check passed; false = at least one failed — run the self-repair loop, do not share the URL.

checks.description: One entry per probe — always includes GET /; a manifest healthcheck path or --health-path adds its own entry.

evidenceUpdated.description: true = the smoke results were appended to the latest deployment record.
